positive: A majestic watercolor-style illustration of a vibrant jungle parrot perched on a thick, twisting branch. The parrot should be rendered in brilliant cyan, emerald green, and royal blue hues, contrasting sharply against the soft, deep jungle canopy background. The composition should be a clean, centered silhouette focused on the bird and the branch, with minimal background noise to ensure print clarity. Sunlight dappling through the leaves creates strong, painterly highlights and deep shadows, giving the image a sense of depth and drama. High detail, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, noise, grain, cartoon, ugly, monochrome, extra limbs, cropped, deformed
